_description: Authoritative Luiz Carolino junction ground-truth graph (D-12/D-13). USER-APPROVED 2026-06-08: the real LC bifurcation is at post 7 (NOT post 9). The 21-31 spur branches off between posts 6 and 7 on the drawing; post 21 is the spur head, connecting westward before post 22. There is exactly ONE real junction in LC.
_authoritative: LOCKED per user approval 2026-06-08. Junction post 7 (degree 3): inbound from post 6, main route continues to post 8, spur arm heads to post 21 (first post of the 21-31 spur). Corrected from the prior post-9 DRAFT.
_correctionNote: Prior DRAFT placed the junction at post 9 with arms 8(inbound)/10/21. User corrected: the junction is at post 7 — the spur leaves the main line between posts 6 and 7, not at post 9. Main chain is now a single 1->2->...->20 spine with post 7 as the branch point; the spur is 7->21->...->31.

7._forbiddenNote: Post 7 is the LC bifurcation: inbound from 6, main route to 8, spur head to 21. No phantom target is incident to post 7 under the corrected topology. The 260602-decouple phantoms (3->1, 11->8, 9->11) were inferred for the WRONG post-9 junction and do not touch post 7 — see _phantomNote (they are asserted absent from the whole graph, not pinned on post 7).

_edgeDirection: Inbound arms are directed armPost -> junction (upstream into the junction); outbound arms are directed junction -> armPost. DFS-with-slots derives inbound from edge direction (no post-number literals).
_phantomNote: 260602-decouple inferred-label phantom pairs for LC: 3->1, 11->8, 9->11. These are inferred-label phantoms that must NEVER be incident to any junction. Under the corrected post-7 topology none are incident to the real junction; they are asserted absent because no such edge exists in the all-declared GT graph (the D-15.2 inferred-only subgraph is empty).
